info.title: Universe API
info.description:
REST and WebSocket API for the Universe orchestrator.

## Authentication
The API uses Bearer token authentication. Include your token in the `Authorization` header:
```
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY
```

## Permissions
- **ALL** — Full access to all endpoints (admin, instance management, config changes, logs)
- **PUBLIC** — No instance endpoints are public. All instance operations require ALL permission.

## Rate Limiting
Public API keys are rate-limited (default: 100 calls per 60 seconds). 
Admin keys (ALL permission) bypass rate limits entirely.

## WebSocket Endpoints
WebSocket connections require the same `Authorization: Bearer TOKEN` header during the handshake.

get.description: Returns basic status information about the Universe node.
Returns system statistics and uptime for the current node.
Returns the current node's main configuration ( UniverseMainConfiguration).

post.description: Reloads the node configuration from disk. (Not fully implemented.)

get.description: Returns a list of all nodes in the Hazelcast cluster.
Returns detailed information about a cluster node, including its instances.

post.summary: Execute a command on a node
post.description:
Executes a console command on the specified node.
- If `id` is the current node: runs locally (not yet implemented)
- If `id` is a remote node: dispatches via Hazelcast (not yet implemented)

400.description: Cannot execute command on local node via API

error.example: Cannot execute command on local node via API

501.description: Remote node command execution not yet implemented

get.description: Returns all instances across the cluster (active and stopped).

post.description: Deploys a new instance using the specified configuration.

get.description:
Returns detailed information about an instance.

**Requires ALL permission**: This endpoint requires an API key with ALL permission.

delete.description: Stops the instance and removes it from the cluster.

get.description:
Returns the most recent log lines for an instance.
Works with all runtimes (Docker, K8s, screen, tmux, process).

**Requires ALL permission**: This endpoint requires an API key with ALL permission.

parameters.name: lines
parameters.description: Number of log lines to return

get.description:
Opens a WebSocket connection that streams live log output from the instance.

**Requires ALL permission**: This endpoint requires an API key with ALL permission.

Connect with:
```
ws://host/api/instances/{id}/live-log
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN
```

Messages are sent as text frames.

put.description: Updates the state and/or heartbeat timestamp of an instance.

patch.description:
Controls the lifecycle of an instance:
- `start` — Start a stopped instance
- `stop` — Stop a running instance
- `restart` — Restart the instance

400.description: Invalid target state or instance not found

post.summary: Execute a command on an instance
post.description:
Sends a command to the instance's stdin. The command is piped directly
to the running process (e.g., Minecraft console).

get.description: Returns a specific configuration by name.

put.description: Creates or updates an instance configuration.

get.description: Returns all available templates organized by group.
Returns details about a specific template.
Returns all files within a local template directory.
Returns the contents of a specific file within a template.

patch.description: Updates the contents of a file within a local template.

post.description:
Creates a new file within a local template. Fails if the file already exists.
Accepts any content type (text, binary, images, jars, etc.).

delete.description: Deletes a file within a local template.

post.description: Exports a local template as a zip file.
Imports a template from a zip file, overwriting existing files.
Downloads the latest version of a template from a remote storage provider.
Dispatches a template sync task to the cluster via Hazelcast.

Executes a command on the Universe master node's console.
The command output is captured and returned in the response.

get.description:
Opens an interactive WebSocket console to the Universe master node.

Connect with:
```
ws://host/api/console
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN
```

Send commands as text frames. Responses are streamed back as text frames.

Returns metrics in Prometheus exposition format.
Used by Prometheus or other monitoring systems.

text/plain.example:
# HELP universe_instances_total Total number of instances
# TYPE universe_instances_total gauge
universe_instances_total 5

bearerAuth.description:
API key token. Generate keys via the console command `key create`.

**Permission Levels:**
- `ALL` — Full admin access to all endpoints
- `PUBLIC` — Read-only access to public endpoints

configurationName.description: Name of the configuration this instance uses

wrapperNodeId.description: ID of the node hosting this instance

hostAddress.description: Host address clients should connect to

runtime.description: Runtime provider used (screen, docker, k8s, etc.)

InstanceState.description:
- **CREATING** — Instance is being deployed
- **ONLINE** — Instance is running and healthy
- **OFFLINE** — Instance has missed heartbeats
- **STOPPED** — Instance has been stopped

static.description: Whether this is a static (persistent) instance

nodes.description: Nodes allowed to host this instance

minimumServiceCount.description: Minimum number of instances to maintain

fileModifications.description: Files to modify after template installation

oneInGroups.description: Template groups to choose one template from

configurationName.description: Name of the configuration to use

lastHeartbeat.description: Unix timestamp (optional, resets if not provided)

command.description: Command to execute on the instance

pattern.description: Template pattern to sync (e.g., default/*, group/name)

command.description: Console command to execute on the master node
